WebLink.url: {! IF( LEN($Site.Name) == 0, URLFOR("/apex/" + $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Namespace__c + "SendInvoicePDF?Id=" + Opportunity.Id + "&invoiceId=" + sugati__Client_Invoice__c.Id), URLFOR($Site.BaseUrl + "/apex/" + $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Namespace__c + "SendInvoicePDF?Id=" + Opportunity.Id + "&invoiceId=" + sugati__Client_Invoice__c.Id) ) }
